summary: Completed comprehensive Playwright browser testing of OpenClaw Mission Control frontend audit fixes. All 10 requested test scenarios PASSED. Verified: thread persistence on refresh (onRehydrateStorage), new thread preserves old thread, delete thread during streaming, SpacesPage delete custom space, CoworkPage manage connectors navigation, 404 redirect, all pages render, thread auto-routing, model selector, and clear all conversations.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, button cannot be a descendant of button' - nested button elements in space card delete button structure

passed_tests: TEST 1: Thread persistence on refresh - Messages persist after page reload (onRehydrateStorage working correctly)
TEST 2: New thread preserves old thread - Clicking 'New thread' shows empty landing, old thread messages remain intact when switching back
TEST 3: Delete thread during streaming - Thread removed from sidebar, no orphaned streaming, returns to landing page
TEST 4: SpacesPage delete custom space - Created 'Test Custom Space', deleted via trash icon, verified default spaces (Files, Design, Development) do NOT show trash icons on hover
TEST 5: CoworkPage manage connectors navigation - Clicked task card, clicked + button, clicked 'Manage connectors', navigated to /settings?tab=apps with Connected Apps tab shown
TEST 6: 404 redirect - Navigating to /nonexistent-page redirects to / (catch-all route working)
TEST 7: All pages render - /dashboard, /jobs, /approvals, /spaces, /cowork, /code, /settings, /customize, /agent all render content (9/9)
TEST 8: Thread auto-routing - Message 'debug my python code' auto-assigned to Development space (green banner visible, green border in sidebar)
TEST 9: Model selector - Clicked 'Select model', hovered openrouter provider, clicked Claude Opus 4.6, selection displayed correctly
TEST 10: Clear all conversations - Settings > Data Controls > Delete all conversations > Confirm - threads cleared from sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: onRehydrateStorage correctly implemented in useGateway.js (lines 741-749) - loads active thread's messages into global state after localStorage rehydration
clearMessages properly clears thread-specific messages and handles streaming cleanup (lines 413-419)
deleteThread correctly clears streamingMessage if deleting the streaming thread (lines 567-575)
SpacesPage correctly filters DEFAULT_SPACE_IDS to prevent deletion of Files/Design/Development spaces (line 8, 78)
CoworkPage 'Manage connectors' navigation uses navigate('/settings?tab=apps') correctly (line 371)
App.js catch-all route <Route path='*' element={<Navigate to='/' replace />} /> working (line 30)
Minor HTML nesting issue: SpacesPage has button inside button for delete icon - should use div with onClick instead
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store with localStorage persistence (version 3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend audit fixes verified working via Playwright browser tests. Key implementations: (1) onRehydrateStorage in persist config loads messages on refresh, (2) clearMessages clears thread-specific messages, (3) deleteThread clears streaming if deleting streaming thread, (4) DEFAULT_SPACE_IDS array prevents deletion of built-in spaces, (5) CoworkPage navigates to /settings?tab=apps for manage connectors, (6) catch-all route redirects unknown paths to /. All APIs MOCKED in Zustand store - no real backend calls.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated streaming ~3s at 10ms/char), executeCommand (simulated terminal), switchModel, all state updates
